entry.title: crystal report for special term on customers & vendors
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm creating two subreports under Aged receivable and aged payables. They are customer info and vendor info with special terms.

I have below conditions to show on both of the subreports:

-Order date less than 2 years

-Active customers or vendors only

-Exclude net 30, net 60, net 90 & net 120

Can you help advise what parameters or formulas I need to apply so that it will show based on above three conditions? Thank you.

entry.title: sap.ui.RichTextEditor conflicting with sap cap application validation message popup
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We're building a SAP BTP CAP-based Fiori app and integrating a custom Rich Text Editor fragment with an Object Page extension controller. We're encountering an error when attempting to create/save record because some fields are mandatory including the fields mapped to fragment. Please see the attached screenshot, the popup window of errors becomes squeezed because of this fragment section and affecting the whole UI. Additionally, we need a solution to make the mapped value in the fragment mandatory how we can show error if null value. 

Please suggest?

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 3
entry.content: fb79bcf488aff9feb63b4936eebc9dadf1dcf850cef8713643888636e98255b2

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere is ready to take over the role of SAP BW
entry.content:
@Kenneth, I'm sure there are users in that case. People usually want to jump into the latest and greatest, even when sometimes don't have a full understanding of it or what it implies. 

Having said that, I agree with you, the step to Datasphere needs to happen, but it doesn't have to be now. 

To fully leverage all the things you mention, the digitalization of the enterprise must take place first, otherwise it's just a waste. This is not small feat so companies with heavy investments in BW and other solutions have to plan in the long term while also making sure disruption is minimum and only when really necessary. Again, right now, Datasphere is more of a natural evolution than an immediate need for the majority of users out there.

entry.content: Very insightful! Thanks for sharing.

entry.title: Re: Doubt - SAP IBP Cost Roll Up calculation
entry.content: Hello Goutam, thanks again, it was a great help! And do you know how does the lead time affect the cost rollup calculation? For example, I am trying to obtain NAGCSTTRANSPORTATIONUNITCOST mentioned in the first post for RW1 for week 18 and there is lead time=3 between the vendor and the plant. So, would it use for obtaining the unit cost the NAGCSTTRANSPORTATIONCOST of week 20 and NAGTOTALRECEIPT of week 18? Or which values would have into account? Best regards, Elena

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Dear @julieplummer20 Julie,
thank You and Your Team members providing us this release!
We can spend again nice times with new ABAP 😊.
Maybe as a last fine tune step for the core basis packages responsible for logon, ALV rendering etc. the SGEN transaction could be executed before releasing the image. Seems everything is compiled on first access. On our local computer this causes performance problems / very slow response. Maybe for the next time when possible, this could be done in advance on your power machines 🙂. I hope this is manageable at Your side.
Thank You

entry.title: Can I add a column to the MAT0M search help?
entry.content:
We would like to add a column (LVORM) to the MAT0M search help. We already added the column to the corresponding view (M_MAT1M).

Is this possible?

TIA,

Luis

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
@Attila I have a different opinion to that. I think it is just nice as it is because if SAP were to run like a complete SGEN before releasing the image, it’ll increase the package size at least two to three times the current size. 
I have tried in the past to run a full SGEN on previous releases and I had to even extend the DB size.

entry.title: ERROR: DEFAULT profile in the DB and in the file system are different
entry.content:
Hi!

I was wondering if anyone experienced this error before and could help out 🙂

I had freshly installed the SAP Netweaver Trial, and upon running SNCWIZARD transaction in SAP GUI I get this error: 

DEFAULT profile in the DB and in the file system are different

Now, I tried to import profiles of all active servers (via transaction RZ10), but that didn't work. I tried to active DEFAULT profile via RZ10; that changed nothing. Finally, I tried to activate DEFAULT.pfl profile via RZ10; this enabled SNCWIZARD. However, in this case, regardless of whether I setup SNCWIZARD, when I restart the SAP system, I can no longer log in via SAP GUI.

Anybody have a clue what is going on here? Much appreciated!

Niko

entry.title: Re: Connect to ABAP environment using RFC
entry.content: Hi Kai, thank you very much for quick reply. I think this is what Im looking for. I tried to launch ABAP development tools but could not find how to activate it. Do I need to install it first? Thanks.

entry.title: Re: sap.ui.RichTextEditor conflicting with sap cap applic...
entry.content:
Hi @itsumerfarooq,

You first need to understand how sapui5 perform user input validation.
That works automatically for standard simple data types:

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/topic/91f06be06f4d1014b6dd926db0e91070

So, let's say you have an input field registered as Float. When the user enters data that isn't allowed by this data type, it displays an error message - so the user can make any necessary corrections. You can register it manually or by using annotations on your OData service. So, if you have a data type like Float defined on your service which is being used by Fiori Elements to display that field - it will display validation errors on it according to what is defined as this standard data type.

You can also define additional custom data types for your application. To do so, please read the documentation below:

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/topic/a90d93df5a024e8bb18826b699c9aaa7

Best regards,
Ivan

entry.title: Re: Push notifications badge
entry.content:
4 weeks now and this is still happening. 

Also, my iphone users are no longer getting notifications.  The wrong generic/wrong icon is showing for android notifications.  Didn't have this issue prior to being moved to the platform.

entry.title: Re: Inquiry on SAP HANA Cloud Database vs. HDI Containers...
entry.content:
Hi @rahuljain257,

HDI is a term used by SAP which could be simply translated to a Database Schema (it is an oversimplification, but it works to better understand it).

When you work in CAP with a HANA Cloud the first step you must do is to create a Database Instance. That is your DBMS. Within the on-prem world, a HANA Platform installation can handle multiple database tenants. However, HANA Cloud will act as a single tenant database. Which means, you do not have multiple database system on BTP unless you have multiple instances of HANA Cloud. 

HANA On-Prem:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_PLATFORM/78209c1d3a9b41cd8624338e42a12bf6/b9489b57634f41afbea1a81c9316ef11.html?locale=en-US

HANA Cloud:

https://help.sap.com/docs/hana-cloud/sap-hana-cloud-getting-started-guide/introduction-to-sap-hana-cloud?locale=en-US

Therefore, the idea on BTP with CAP is to have a single HANA Cloud instance (which contains a single database) and reuse it as much as possible across all your applications. 

So, instead of manually creating a database schema, and schema users, authorization to that schema, etc. - you will simply create an instance of an HDI. Internally, that instance creation will automatically create an empty schema for your application that is ready to be used. 

Once you bind that HDI instance to an application, the platform automatically creates environment variables for your application so that it easily finds all data needed to connect to that schema, deploy database artifacts and run SQL statements.

CAP is an opinionated framework in which you will model your database entities and services using an artifact that is coded in CDS syntax. That artifact gets "compiled" (I should say, translated) into several artifacts that each system understands natively. So, if your CAP project is targeting HANA as its database it will first create all entities defined in CDS as an artifact with the extension HDBTABLE. Analogously, a CDS View would be defined as HDBVIEW and so on. Such artifacts are known as database native artifacts (AKA design time artifacts) and they can be issued to a HANA database to create what is known as Runtime Artifacts. Don't worry about how to deploy them - you won't be deploying them manually anyway.  

So, instead of creating your application using DDL, you will be defining the data entities and their relationships (similar to a ERM diagram but more text descriptive and human friendly) in CDS syntax. You will also define any OData services using the same syntax. CAP will handle the database artifact creation as well as implement the services required. Services will feature all HTTP methods (CRUDS) but can then be then extended in either Java or NodeJS according to your needs.

When you package your project for distribution, the package contains a reference to what is known as HDI Deployer. The database deployer is an app which handles all HDI runtime artifacts. So it will be the application that runs "once-per-deploy" and will be issuing any relevant SQL/Database commands to update tables, views, etc on the HDI container.

The documentation you referenced here explains how to obtain access from CAP to a runtime artifact that has been created by other means. Let's say you have a Java application that uses your HANA Cloud instance as data persistency. Java usually requires you to send a DDL file in order to have all the runtime artifacts created. Therefore, you cannot reference them on your CDS file using its syntax directly. You have to configure your HDI to include the credentials needed to connect to the Java Schema. Plus, you must  recreate the same data in CDS syntax in order to reference data from that application into yours. 

Hope this helps.

Best regards,
Ivan

entry.title: Latest Updates to the Reimagined Applicant Management Tool in SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting
entry.content:
1H 2024 Updates to the Reimagined Applicant Management Tool in SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting

In the second half of 2023, we released the reimagined Applicant Management tool in SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting to enable talent acquisition teams to screen and filter applicants more efficiently. As part of the ongoing initiative to improve the hiring experience, we have delivered continued enhancements to this tool, including AI-assisted applicant screening. Please note, the reimagined Applicant Management tool will become universal in the 1H 2024 release, with the legacy applicant workbench being deprecated in the 1H 2025 release. For additional details on the timeline, please scroll to the bottom of this post.

In the upcoming 1H 2024 release, there are several new enhancements that will improve how recruiters can search and view applicants:

AI-assisted applicant screening

Recruiters can now use AI to help screen applicants by matching skills extracted from their resume to skills on job requisitions. This helps recruiters to easily identify the best fit talent based on their skills compatibility. By selecting an applicant’s profile, recruiters can also see matching, related, and missing skills, as well as view other skills they have that don’t match to the job.   

Sorting applicants

Applicants can now be sorted in ascending or descending order by the different columns. For example, applicants can be sorted by applicant name, status, application date, applicant type, etc.  

Applicant history comments

Recruiters can now view comments on an applicant’s profile for previous jobs they’ve applied for.

Assessment vendor integrations

For jobs that require applicants to complete an assessment as part of the hiring process, it is now possible to display assessment requirements, status, and access their results.

Background check

Recruiters can now initiate background checks on applicants with First Advantage or other third-party vendors. Once initiated, the Background Check portlet will appear on the Activity tab.

Interview results

This new portlet shows recruiters interview results from Interview Central, including overall rating, details for each skill and competency and comments from interviewers. This detailed page for each applicant also provides an easy navigation to view all Candidate Ratings to compare multiple applicants on a single page.

Continuous updates & how you can help

To learn about all of the enhancements to the Applicant Management tool, explore details in the SAP Help Portal. To participate in ongoing improvements to the tool, please submit feedback on the latest capabilities within the Applicant Management tool, on the top right of the page (chat box with smiley face), or submit a response here.

Upcoming release timeline for the Applicant Management tool:

  • 1H 2024 Release (May): Admin Universal
  • 2H 2024 Release (Nov): End of Support for Legacy Workbench
  • 1H 2025 Release (May): Full Depreciation of the Legacy Workbench

Please advice what could be the cause for this.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Tables on purchase invoice
entry.content:
Hi,

It really all depends on your specific Purchase Invoice creation scenario, but should you have included row or header Freight charges as well, you may wish to check tables PCH2 (A/P Invoice - Freight - Rows) and PCH3 (A/P Invoice - Freight) as well.

Best of luck.

entry.title: Re: Complete the branding of your UI5 apps with a favicon
entry.content: Regarding the component manifest, it is my understanding that those icons need to come from the icon pool and they are used in the FLP shell navigation.  In the screenshot below, I provided a favIcon.ico file to the app and the index.html file as you described.  In the manifest, is provided icons found in the SAP Icon Explore called 'meal'.

entry.title: Extend Your Crystal Reports Solutions in the DHTML Viewer With a Free Function Library
entry.content:
If you use Crystal Reports 2020 in CR Server 2020 or BusinessObjects 4.3, you can extend your reporting solutions with the free / open-source webElements Custom Function library. This library allows an expert report developer to add new functionality and web controls to a Crystal Report for use in the DHTML viewer. 

The webElements Custom Function Library Can be Used by Report Developers To:

  1. Embed different controls into an SAP BI Crystal Report to create custom prompt interfaces.
  2. Create dashboard-style reports with more interactivity or an auto-refresh capability.
  3. Develop interfaces / forms for write-backs to the database, when using a target report based on a stored procedure.
  4. Create workflows to pass custom-filtered and selected data to another report.
  5. Customize, hide, or suppress components of the Crystal Reports viewer. e.g. Suppress the refresh button, limit export options to data only options, or remove the viewer borders for a cleaner look.
  6. Develop reports which can create an email utilizing selected report data.
  7. Prevent drill-down on group-level objects and subreports.
  8. Create reports with hierarchical section navigation. (See the picture below.)

Simplified Development Process:

  1. Pass-through HTML is activated on the server where you want to run the customized reports. Further instructions, documentation, and sample reports are available in the webElements GitHub repository. 
  2. The Custom Functions are installed into the CR Server or BusinessObjects Repository using the main / master sample report.
  3. The library is then installed onto a development report. See the first picture below.
  4. Sample formulas for the individual controls can be copied from the main / master sample report onto the development report to be customized. See the second picture below.
  5. A formula for a submit method (e.g. a button or link) to a named target report is added to the development report.
  6. A formula is added to the development report which ties in all of the controls and builds the necessary code.
  7. The development report is saved to the server environment to be tested in the DHTML viewer.

      

Notes:

  • The free / open source webElements library was originally created for version 9 of Crystal Reports. There have been several versions since then.
  • This current version is only for Crystal Reports 2020 in the DHTML viewer.
  • The library utilizes the supported Pass-Through HTML feature in the report server environment. This feature allows report developers to add HTML and JavaScript directly to their reports.
  • Existing reports do not necessarily need to be modified. Wrapper / parent reports can be used to interact with existing reports.
  • There is no direct support from SAP for the webElements Custom Function library as it is an open-source report development library.
  • There are sample reports available which demonstrate some of the design concepts and help with the development process. Several of the samples have further instructions on the report.
  • Data from a report can be used to populate the webElements controls. This is probably the most complicated part of the process as it involves creating a string running total / string aggregation for a control to consume. There is a sample report that shows how this is done.

To find more information or download the sample reports go to the webElements GitHub repository. The repository may be updated periodically. Please feel free to ask any questions below or reach out to me with a direct message.

entry.title: handling unit it does not appear in the sampling worklist report
entry.content:
Hi,

I have emptied the handling unit in Storage type P99, making the quantity of the Handling unit in storage location 9000. After that, I transferred it to storage location 1000, and then transferred  it to sampling location. However, when viewing the handling unit in the sampling worklist report, it does not appear. This is due to it being previously transferred to storage location 9000. Please, how can I solve this problem so that it appears in the sampling worklist report?

entry.title: Re: Bill Of Material need to show in tree structure into...
entry.content:
Unfortunately, you can't show the complete structure, its standard behaviour and does not make sense especially if there are hundreds of lines in each BOM. 

A workaround would be to develop a crystal report layout and deploy it on BOM to show the complete tree.

entry.title: Re: Best practice to connect to multiple databases (Cryst...
entry.content: Hi satech, I'm not sure if this would be considered a "best practice" but perhaps look into Linked Servers to accomplish this and base the new consolidated report on that configuration. Here is a fairly comprehensive article on the DB server part.

entry.title: Re: Timer showing while sending the mails from SAP
entry.content: Please make sure the sender email configured in SMTP is accessible by third-party applications, if you have used Gmail then please make sure OTP is used in SMTP configurations.

entry.title: Re: "Failed to update setup engine executables. Program will exit" installing Crystal Repo
entry.content: this worked for me out of many suggestions here. thank you.

entry.title: Work center hierarchy migration object does not exist in S/4HANA 2023 version
entry.content:
During the creation of the migration object with regards to the work center hierarchy, the object didn´t list into the migration cockpit.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Work center hierarchy migration object does not exist...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

As per SAP Help Portal - PP - Work center hierarchy, this migration object is available for  Approach Direct Transfer - ERP, not for staging table approach.

Hence if you have created your project with file / staging table approach, it won't be available as it is not delivered.

You may filter the Migration Approach column in Available Migration Objects to only see migration objects relevant for you.

Best regards,

Irene

entry.title: CFD持续功能交付-财务新功能（2402.1~2）
entry.content:
CFD持续功能交付 根据链接可以知晓当前2系统的CFD持续功能交付的计划，本博文汇总了2402.1~2的部分财务新功能更新。

3系统架构的升级及CFD更新计划参见链接

全部CFD请参考链接另外也可以参考注释3423309 - SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2402 and SAP Marketing Cloud 2402 - Patch Collection Information Note

科目主数据的实施状态的批量更改

关于实施状态的功能可以先参见博客来了解，启用并使用。

在启用实施状态之后， 实施状态“在科目主数据里便处于活动状态时，在管理总账科目主数据”应用中，您现在可以使用“科目级别和公司代码级别的批量更改”功能对多个科目批量执行维护‘实施状态’。

在物料成本估算的项目明细级别显示 CO2e 值

此功能允许您在物料成本估算的项目明细级别显示二氧化碳排放总值。这对于确保成本核算期间完成的计算的可追溯性非常重要。此外，CO2e 总排放值在已核算成本的多级物料清单结构中可见。

在显示“物料成本估算” (CK13N) 和“创建物料成本估算” (CK11N) 应用中，您现在可以在“项目明细”和已“成本核算的多级物料清单”部分中显示以下附加列：

  • “CO2e 排放总计”
  • “CO2e 总排放单位”

如果缺省情况下未显示新列，则可以通过“管理布局”按钮手动添加。在“列选择”下，只需按“列集中的”“关键指标”和“单位”进行过滤，然后选择相应的列并将其添加到“显示的列中”。

需要激活使用6VN (产品相关碳排放量)，此范围项目仅与以下必须激活的必需前提条件范围项目结合使用：

集成财务计划 (4RC)
通过 SAP Analytics Cloud 导入连接设置 (1YB)
产品足迹管理 (5IM)

显示实际成本核算结果中流程类别视图的自定义导出

在app显示实际成本核算结果里，您可以使用 “自定义导出” 按钮将“流程类别视图”标签中显示的数据导出到电子表格。此标签显示选择的物料的已评估交易和物料价格确定结果。物料分类账数据显示在价格确定结构中，并按流程类别分组。

使用处理规则处理预付款请求

通过“管理处理规则 - 针对银行对账单”应用中的此功能，您可以启用处理规则以处理预付款请求。

在此版本中，SAP 预提供连接到 402 解释算法的“预付款请求” (0012) 处理指令。如果已具有操作类型为“按顺序清算”的处理规则，或者使用该操作类型创建新的处理规则，则可以选择“预付款请求” (0012) 处理指令，该指令使处理规则能够搜索、识别和清算预付款请求。

测试和比较财务会计中高级和传统评估的结果

如果已使用传统评估，则可以将高级评估作业配置为“测试运行”并执行。您可以将这些测试运行的结果与您在生产中使用的传统评估应用和作业的结果进行比较。无需在生产模式下切换到高级评估作业即可执行此操作。SAP官方建议及早切换到高级评估及其流程，详细请参阅链接

“在计划总账作业”应用中，您计划在财务会计作业中使用以下高级评估：

过账长期资产和负债的贴现

高级外币评估

过账基于信用风险的减值

过账资产负债表重新分类

您已在以下应用中使用传统评估：

执行外币评估

执行进一步评估

或者，

“在计划总账作业”应用中，使用以下作业模板：

外币评估

重新分组应收账款/应付账款

坏账准备金

对于已使用传统评估的公司代码，可以在财务会计中执行高级评估作业作为“测试运行”。这样，您可以将传统评估的结果与财务会计作业中的高级评估结果进行比较。

必须先对作业进行配置，然后才能在财务会计中执行高级评估作为“测试运行”。有关详细信息,请参阅链接

计划信用管理作业新增作业模板

通过“一致性检查”作业模板的这些增强，您可以检查情况的设置是否完整并验证特定用户的通知设置。

“计划信用管理作业” 应用的 “一致性检查” 作业模板中提供以下新字段：

  • “检查设置”：检查多个设置，例如：如果情况类型链接到情况模板、是否已创建并启用情况通知，或者是否已创建并激活信用管理相关团队类别的团队。
  • “通知”：您可以检查特定用户的通知设置，以验证电子邮件通知是否处于活动状态。

entry.title: Re: date field bug in iPhone dark mode
entry.content:
Oi @MaiaraEllwanger !

O aplicativo exportado e já lançado na Apple Store, quando o Iphone (indiferente da versão) está no modo escuro, o campo da data fica daquela maneira como anexado na foto, no SAP Preview o campo fica normal

Para verificar, tenho dois aplicativos e os dois apresentam o mesmo bug

App 58077: Ministerio FamilyDesk

App 58080: Responsavel FamilyDesk

 
No momento, tenho buscado outras alternativas dentro desses aplicativos para trocar a forma de colocar o campo da data e apenas alterei o componente para não ficar visivel, para que os usuários não sofram o impacto, mas durante a analise, é só retomar o componente para aparecer na tela
Muito obrigado!

entry.title: Re: New 1H 2024 SAP Successfactors Time (Tracking) Features
entry.content:
If we plan to use self service instance refresh tool, we should not enable CSD :

https://me.sap.com/notes/3444580/E

or else we are condamned to request manual refresh thru support

Erika

entry.title: Re: Kit to stock in EWM with production order,but not cre...
entry.content:
Hi,

      Thanks for you reply, Our EWM system is Embedded.I read the sap help document and another article. It says we can do kitting to stock in EWM with production order, so I want to reproduce it in our system. I have ticked the 'kit to stock in EWM' flag, and the value of WM request is '2'. the determination of delivery type has been set.  but we can't get the outbound delivery and inbound delivery, The packing specification is not maintianed in EWM.but I think it doesn't impact the delivery will be created in S4. so I don't know whethere  I miss some configurations. thanks!

SAP help:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_EXTENDED_WAREHOUSE_MANAGEMENT/3d97bec9bf1649099384bb8167df3cf2/4ccacb53ad377114e10000000a174cb4.html?locale=de-DEversion%3D9.5.0.1

entry.title: Stock Ageing Report just gone live of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi,

There's a question raised regarding stock ageing report when a client site has just gone live with S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Can anyone share their experience if stock ageing report can be done when the client is quite new or has just gone live?

Obvious answer (if i'm not mistaken) is NO, standard reporting for stock ageing might not be of use in the beginning, for obvious reason of not having historical dates when posting "just the opening stock balance" when going live. 

But I'm more particularly interested in possible customized reporting, or perhaps possible use of SAP Analytics Cloud if needed.  Or perhaps is there a special way (or work around) of posting opening stock balance in S/4HANA Cloud for go live purposes, in such a way that you can bring-in some sort of historical dates as well... and in that way stock ageing report can be useful even if the client has just gone live with the system?

Your inputs will be greatly appreciated.

Thanks

Cath

entry.title: Re: CAP vs. RAP: Navigating the Choice of SAP Programming Models for Your Projects
entry.content: Thanks Aditya for sharing

entry.title: Production order number range
entry.content: Due to Production order number range can't be added or changed in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, what sholud I do when number range of one type production order reached limit?

entry.title: Re: From OData Provisioning (Cloud Foundry) to SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi Axel,

I'd like to clarify exactly how the OData services need to be exposed on the backend ECC system to be used with Integration Suite API Management.

With Neo OData Provisioning it connects to the /sap/iwbep SICF service on the backend ECC system to retrieve the OData Service Catalog and to do regular OData Service CRUD operations. This works fine with systems that are very old (e.g. NW 7.00) which can only install the IW_BEP Gateway backend component.

Can you confirm if the API method from BTP Integration Suite to expose OData Services can also do the same (communicate with /sap/iwbep backend component on the ECC system for OData operations)? I'd like to understand if this is a 100% replacement for ODP, or if it has limitations - such as it only works with systems that can have Gateway Frontend (IW_FND/GW_CORE or SAP_GWFND) installed and OData Services exposed via /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE and visible under /sap/opu/odata/xxxxxx. The blog and comments so far seem to indicate the latter, but I'd like to check to be sure.

Thanks,

Brendan

entry.title: Re: SPRO configuration to track changes to Batch master f...
entry.content:
I'm not sure if table CDHDR has the information you need.

Because this field is not used in my system.

Maybe you can try to use the table, Thanks!

entry.title: Demand Planning using historical sales data when just gone live with S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi,

Can i kindly get some inputs (sharing of ideas/experience, materials, blogs, links etc.) regarding addressing a requirement of being able to use S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition demand planning (or preparing sales forecast), when the client site has just gone live with the system?

These historical sales data is currently in excel, and the solution package include SAC planning (SAP Analytics Cloud), but they don't have SAP IPB.  The question is how can the client do a quite seamless demand planning or sales forecast preparation incorporating these sales history in excel, and potentially feed a final demand plan into S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?  Can SAC planning be used with excel perhaps saved in a shared folder (SharePoint or company shared drive) as a data source?

Your inputs will be greatly appreciated.

Regards,

Cathy

entry.title: SAP MAXDB : Content Server Administration - Repository Status
entry.content:
Hello!

I manage old SAP MAXDB for Content Servers. I would like to check the Data and Log usage (%) through the Content Server Administration(Program SAPLSCMS_CS_ADMIN).

For example, there are 4 repositories being operated on a single server.

 
In the GUI, some repositories are indicated as Running in their status, while others show data(XX%) log(XX%).
Can I change the status displayed as Running to the format of data(XX%) log(XX%) to check the usage?

 

Thanks.

Have a great day!

entry.title: Re: BTP Build Apps- Error while integration of BTP Destination - request failed with status code 400
entry.content:
Thanks! It worked. Appreciate your consideration to post the answer. None of the below mentions this as a point to take note of which surprises me or makes me believe that the assumption is that host name rules are common knowledge to be known by everyone.

3063160 - All catalog service requests failed for system: <destination URL>/<sap_client>. OData version(s): V2, V4

All catalog service requests failed for system: OData version(s): V2, V4. 

SAP Help Documentation for Cloud Connector:

Even this blog and others:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-to-guide-connectivity-setup-with-abap-and-sap-cloud-connector/ba-p/13391192

https://github.com/SAP-samples/s4hana-cloud-extension-process-automation/blob/main/documentation/set-up/connectivity/README.md

None mentions this a point to note. Not sure why. But thanks a lot to post the answer. Kudos!

entry.title: Grouping Key not found in BP vendor company view (S4)
entry.content:
Hi All,

I can't find the grouping key in vendor company view via transaction code BP. I am using the standard role from SAP which is FI vendor. I want to group all the open items into a single payment document even they are different vendor codes in F110 payment run. That's why I want to use grouping key.

Below is the screen from BP vendor company view - FI vendor role

I try to adjust the account group layout, layout per company code and the field grouping per BP role.

But still not work. Anyone can help?

entry.title: Re: How to set BOM when splitting material codes from dif...
entry.content:
When selling to region 1, supplier A with material code 1001A can be chosen through the Pre-condition (OD).

When selling to region 2, you can create a New material 1001 and maintain it into the BOM, and set OD  pre-condition to choose this new material 1001 when region =2.

Then Create FFF （PIC01）for the Main material 1001， and Set the 1001A  1001B 1001C into this FFF group, when Running MRP, the system will generate 1001 as PR, and the 1001A  1001B 1001C can be interchangeable. 

For more information about MPN, you can check the link as below.

Interchangeable Manufacturer Parts in MRP | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: Business Configuration in SAP BTP ABAP Environment (1): Overview and BC Maintenance Apps
entry.content:
Thanks Thomas for looking into it.

we raised the ticket to support team for adding new configuration to table tcurx table.

entry.title: Is it possible to group all open items into a single payment document?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I get the requirement from my users, they want to group all opened item into a single payment document via F110 automatic payment program. Even it include multiple vendor codes, they want to show one payment document only. So only one bank account will be credit. I can't find any setting or configuration in FBZP, most of them related to how to separate the payment into different clearing document.  

Debit: Vendor code

Credit: Bank account

 

Current testing result

entry.title: Third Party with Subcontracting PREQ from Schedule line doesnt generate component requirement
entry.content:
Material type: FIn goods (QTY/Value updating- X) 

When  Requirement class No MRP indicator is "1"  : MRP run doesnt recognize the third Party Preq generated from Sales order schedule line  "DS" with Account assignment category "X" and the components dependent requirements (Planned orders) are not generated and requisition is  displayed in MD04 with exception 20 cancel process and 26 Excess in segment ( No other requirement exist.

After this , If Requirement class "No MRP" is changed to Blank then duplicate Purchase req is created with account assignment "M" derived from the Requirement class apart from the one existing in Schedule line in the sales order. This PREQ however generates dependent requirement and planned order for component on MRP run.
I already checked multiple blogs including this one which matches to everything similar, but it doesnt talk about component requirements for the subcontracting and MRP explosion.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/third-party-subcontracting-process-overview-in-sap-s-4hana/ba-p/13556558


Any help appreciated .

entry.title: Re: Kit to stock in EWM with production order,but not cre...
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

     I have resolved the issue, I found the queues are stucked via tcode SMQ1, after I registered the queue with prefix 'KSS' via tcode SMQR. Now

the inbound delivery and outbound delivery can be created successfully. thanks!

entry.title: Re: How To Upload Data to a Public or Private Planning Version Using a File Upload Custom Widget Wi
entry.content:
Hi @AmandaJMurphy  @gerd_schoeffl 

Rejected reason is request failed. can you please explain why request is failed.

Regards,
Thayu.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - How to do Data Refresh for Marketpla...
entry.content:
Why not in the component editor create a new property called "Refresh" that is true/false and anytime you want to refresh the data you change its value (making it the opposite). Then hook up that property's change event to the existing logic for updating the data.

Instead of having a visual UI that you click, you can as part of your logic flow simply update the bound variable to that property.

You could make it slightly more elegant by resetting the refresh to false within the above logic and then if you want to refresh you set the property to true each time, though this might lead to double refresh each time. To solve that you could check the variable in the logic.

Here I have Northwind's product entity bound to the Basic List with Selection on Right control, to which I added a true/false property called Refresh. I have an app variable of text that is bound to the filter, as well as to the input box. When I change the text, I can then click the Refresh checkbox to refresh he data retrieval.

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: Re: Preparing for SAP Identity Management’s End-of-Maintenance in 2027
entry.content:
Hi @MichaelFr ,

Thanks for the update because it's been very difficult to respond to customer RFPs when identity management capabilities appear. At least we have a likely scenario for this issue in the future, although we do not  have any currently solution to sell to the customer with this need.

Do you think we will be able to sell the Microsoft Entra ID as a Solex in our pricelist or will this product only be available in our SAP Store or a direct contract with Microsoft?

Best Regards

Artur

entry.title: SAP Ariba Supplier Management 2405 Release Key Innovations Preview
entry.content:
Hello SAP Ariba Supplier Management Community and welcome to our 2405 key innovations blog for supplier management. We have some great new features coming out this quarter with enhancements to our extensibility, advanced integration with D&B Direct+ as well as a new way to monitor and report on finding and event collaboration. Let’s drive right in!

New Endpoint in Supplier Data API with Pagination to Extract Inactive Suppliers

We have enhanced our Supplier Data API to include a new endpoint, inactiveVendorDataRequests, which allows users to extract data of all inactive suppliers in your site. This addition will empower your organization to retrieve comprehensive details of inactive suppliers, such as supplier names, addresses, registration status, qualification status, and more.

Monitor Findings for Finding and Event Collaboration

Our new Monitor Findings app simplifies the tracking of actions initiated with suppliers during finding and event collaboration. This application enables users to view and download reports based on their involvement and contributions to specific findings. Users can also customize reports to reflect specific findings and export the data to a spreadsheet for further analysis. This application not only enhances the visibility of actions but also promotes informed decision-making and easier regulatory reporting.Monitor Findings for Finding and Event Collaboration

 

Dun & Bradstreet Integration Using D&B Direct+

This feature adds the option for using the newer D&B Direct+ product to retrieve data for selected fields in supplier requests and registration questionnaires. We recommend customers upgrade their D&B integrations to use D&B Direct+ as it provides continued business usage with minimal configuration. This feature ensures customers stay updated with the latest offerings from D&B.

We are confident these new features in the SAP Ariba 2405 release will provide our customers with an improved experience and more streamlined processes. As always, we are dedicated to continuous improvement and innovation in our solutions to serve you better.

We invite you to explore these features in more detail in our SAP Ariba 2405 Release Key Innovations Preview. Also, stay tuned for our additional upcoming blog posts and follow me to stay informed on upcoming feature releases across SAP Ariba.

Thank you for being a part of the SAP Ariba community and we look forward to continuing our journey of innovation together!

  • Register for the Early Release Series for 2405 release
  • Resources:
    • Feature related materials
      • SAP Ariba Connect - Release Readiness (Customers except CIM)
      • Readiness Community page (For CIM customers)
      • SAP Community for Intelligent Spend Management page
      • SAP Help Portal pages - Procurement and Network
      • What’s New

        Want to see more? Take a look at our SAP Products and Services YouTube channel and our Spend Management and Business Network playlist.

entry.title: Using PINGFED, would that be considered as MFA for SAP BI login?
entry.content:
Current using SAP BI 4.2 SP9, for internal user, with PINGFED authentication, can that considered as MFA qualification for launching BI login URL?

For external user/client, outside of company platform, what requirements need to meet MFA before able to launch BI login URL?

entry.title: SAP Ariba Procure to Order 2405 Release Key Innovations
entry.content:
Hello SAP Ariba community and welcome to our 2405 key innovation blog for procure to order.

Focusing on the 'Procure to Order' area. Our team has been hard at work to deliver these key features that streamline procurement processes, providing a seamless, efficient, and effective user experience for buyer and supplier

SAP Ariba Buying, guided buying capability - Addition of Contract Numbers in RFQs 

When suppliers that have purchasing contracts respond to RFQs, they often need to know the contract numbers to provide accurate quotes.  

With this enhancement in Guided Buying, commodity level contract number can now be included when RFQs are created.  

This means valid contract numbers for preferred and qualified suppliers in RFQs will be visible to both buyer and supplier. This feature not only elevates the precision of quotes but also optimizes time and effort for all stakeholders in the RFQ process.  

Contract number on RFQ

 

SAP Ariba Buying, guided buying capability - Improved visibility in Delegated Purchase Requisitions

We've heard your feedback around visibility and ease of access to approved requisitions within the delegation process. Previously it was difficult for delegators to find requisitions they had delegated and that had been approved in their absence.

Now, both the delegator and delegatee can find approved requisitions in 'Recent approvals' and information about the delegator and delegatee is available on the approval flow.

This feature enhances transparency, speeds up your procurement process, and ensures smoother collaboration.

Recent approvals selection


SAP Ariba Buying - Display the Total Amount and Taxes for Requisitions in the Requester's or the Preparer’s Currency

This new addition allows you to choose whether you want to view the total amount and taxes of a purchase requisition in the requester's currency or the preparer's currency.  This feature applies when a preparer creates a purchase requisition on behalf of a requester in the SAP Ariba Buying or the SAP Ariba Buying and Invoicing solutions and the local currency of the preparer differs from that of the requester.

This should help provide a more personalized experience, catering to specific requirements and making cross-border transactions easier to manage.

SAP Ariba Buying, guided buying capability - Default Header-Level Costs to Requesters’ or Preparers’ Currency

Building on the theme of delegation flexibility for Preparers and Requestors

This feature in Guided Buying allows you to determine which user's currency is used for header-level costs on purchase requisitions. If the requester and preparer used different currencies, header-level costs displayed two different currencies. Now, on-behalf-of requisitions can default to the preparer's or requester's currency.

This will ensures consistency and avoid any confusion that may arise from displaying two different currencies.

Header level costs on purchase requisition

 

SAP Ariba Buying, guided buying capability - Ability to copy Non-PO Invoices (Guided Invoicing Capability)

Last but not least, we've introduced the ability to copy Non-PO Invoices created in Guided Buying. This feature allows users to quickly create new invoices using the same information as an existing invoice such as line items, tax, header and custom fields and making the necessary updates for the new invoice. This in turn minimizes manual entry, reduces errors, and accelerates the invoice creation process, ultimately leading to improved productivity.

Copy Non-PO Invoices in Guided Buying

We're confident that these enhancements will provide significant business value and improve your overall SAP Ariba experience. Stay tuned for more exciting updates!

  • Register for the Early Release Series for 2405 release
  • Feature related materials SAP Ariba Connect - Release Readiness (Customers except CIM)
  • Readiness Community page (For CIM customers)
  • SAP Community for Intelligent Spend Management page
  • SAP Help Portal pages - Procurement and Network
  • What’s New

Please check out the other blogs, and subscribe to the authors for latest updates aswell as the following resources on our YouTube channels:

  • SAP Products and Services YouTube channel - https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLWV533hWWvDk7zRbhOsWQkF5BGWokhHYH
  • "Spend Management and Business Network" playlist - https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLWV533hWWvDk7zRbhOsWQkF5BGWokhHYH&si=zTlYobcledkWNQ2M

entry.title: To take the previous pay component Amount in Appointment Letter in document generation
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

One of my customer has this following ask to fetch the previous pay component(Basic) Amount in Appointment Letter in document generation.

In Employee Central we only have Monthly Basic pay component.

We need to maintain the same in appointment letter. Can we take the last amount of Basic pay component which was there during hire date of employee.

For eg- An employee got hired on 6 june 2021 & the BASIC was 20000. So in Appointment letter we need that 20000 amount as his BASIC Amount, not the revised details.

 

Please let us know the feasibility.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements App - With Intent Based Navigation doe...
entry.content:
I found the solution myself. The problem in my case was that I opened the app with the URL from the deployment:

http://xxx/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/z_rechnung_01?sap-client=100

In this case the navigation didn't work. But if I used the URL with the semantic object, everything worked fine

https://xxx/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/shells/abap/Fiorilaunchpad.html#Z_RECHNUNG_SEM01-display

i have already a "Z" report in SAP-SD module to fetch SD customer related detail with reference of customer code, Now i want to fetch all consignee detail with consignee creation date reference of customer code. 

parameter we use in report

Company code : 

Sales Org. :

Date : From Date and To Date (Creation Date of Consignee)

Select "Consignee" radio button to fetch consignee between "From & To Date" reference of customer.

Please help me if SAP ABAP have any solution this issue, I just want what logic will set to resolve this issue.

Thank & Regards,

Vikash

entry.title: Re: How create a plugin session timeout with a countdown...
entry.content:
You can make use of mousemove and keypress events to constantly update user's last interaction time. Upon long inactivity, you can display your timer and finally logout the user by forwarding them to logout URL. See following code for a rough idea of how to do it:

1. Constantly update user's last interaction info using "mousemove" and "keypress" events:

 

var glbl_usr_last_intrction = Date.now();
const update_timestamp = () => {
    glbl_usr_last_intrction = Date.now();
    hide_timer(); //in case timer was visible
}

window.addEventListener('mousemove', update_timestamp);
window.addEventListener('keypress', update_timestamp);

 

 2. Check user's last interaction time every 10 seconds and display the timer or logout if inactive for too long:

 

const inactive_threshold_timer = 120000; // 2 minutes
const inactive_threshold_logout = 420000; // 7 minutes

const check_last_intrction = () => {
    if (Date.now() - glbl_usr_last_intrction > inactive_threshold_logout) {
        window.location.href = "/sap/public/bc/icf/logoff";
        return;
    }
    if (Date.now() - glbl_usr_last_intrction > inactive_threshold_timer) {
        display_timer();
    }
    setTimeout(check_last_intrction, 10000);
}
check_last_intrction();

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content:
Nice selfie!

Unfortunately, the hash does not look correct. Did you find the secret phrase (by tapping somewhere in the app)?

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content:
Unfortunately, the hash does not look correct. Did you find the secret phrase (by tapping somewhere in the app) and did you enter your community ID, KP9?

Try to upload an image of the screen, or use the web preview and take a screenshot from that. That will also let us know if you entered your community ID properly.

entry.title: Re: Why does a restore fail with error message 'LogAndDataIncompatible'?
entry.content: Thanks!!!!

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 1 - S/4HANA OData
entry.content: The screenshot looks nice and I'm glad you were able to get the data returned. Unfortunately, the hash does not look correct. I can see that the returned data is not correct -- see the next few replies and their screenshots to get a sense of what the returned data should look like. Make sure you are filtering and sorting as in the instructions

entry.title: Re: Can I add a column to the MAT0M search help?
entry.content:
Hi Luis,

instead of modifying the Elementary Search Help MAT0M I would recommend to extend the Collective Search Help MAT1_A with an Append Search Help. This can be done in the customer namespace and there will be no problems with the next SAP update.

Greetings
Torsten

entry.title: How to configure SAP system in Eclipse ?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts !

We have to configure SAP system (Dev 100) in eclipse, we have tried multiple times but unable to do it. The Next and Finish  button are disabled that's why we could not complete steps. Kindly refer below Screen-shot for your information. I hope we will get the best solution form your side, as this issue is pending from last 2 months.

Note : I have explored multiple blogs post one of them is, 
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/how-to-deploy-a-simple-sapui5-application-into-abap-server-using-eclipse/ba-p/13173902 , but unfortunately could not configure completely. 

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: LLM, RAG and Cloud Foundry: No space left on device
entry.content: The main problem indeed is the size of the app. The pip install of sentence-transform installs a lot of prerequisites. When choosing a proper combination of these and install them before installing it, it will reduce the size of the app to below the limit for storage capacity of the cf environment.

entry.title: Re: SAP MAXDB : Content Server Administration - Repositor...
entry.content:
If the storage reaches a filling degree of at least 70%, the repository status in transaction CSADMIN changes from "running" or "offline" to "data(xx%) log(xx%)" or "data(xx%)" depending on the storage type (SAPDB or Filesystem).
The suspension of a database transaction cannot be circumvented, but the filling indicator should help a content server administrator to take appropriate measures to ensure the operability of the content server.

Data and Log levels are only shown when they exceed 70%. This threshold can be configured, see SAP Note: 
329473 - Description of Content Server and Cache Server configuration file

entry.title: Re: The deployed project is not reflecting in Agent
entry.content: Thanks for the solution.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content: @albanleong, running full SGEN makes no sense in trial for sure. We barely use all programs. I did back in 15 years with minisap a full SGEN like You explain with same effects and I killed it! This is why I said only selective core packages, not a full SGEN. In SGEN you can do very fine granular selection on package level. Picking up several will not increase the image size drastically.

entry.title: There were some trfcs error in SAP car but we have cleared that trfcs still data not reach to target
entry.content: some TIDS got missed to reach target S4H

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authentication...
entry.content:
Hi @Jacopo_Carrara 

Yes it's possible. You can create trust configuration between ECC (tcode - saml2) and IAS by exchanging metadata files. All the access which runs through browser to ECC system will go through IAS after configuration is completed.

You can change the configuration in IAS ->Applications -> conditional authentication to your corporate IDP to act as proxy to your 3rd party AD.

You can use Risk based authentication to enable 2 factor authentication for users.

https://help.sap.com/docs/identity-authentication/identity-authentication/configure-risk-based-authentication-for-application#loiobc52fbf3d59447bbb6aa22f80d8b6056

 

Please let me know if it helps !

Thanks and Regards

Sushil K Gupta

entry.title: Re: Doubt - SAP IBP Cost Roll Up calculation
entry.content: Hello Elena, The value of the NAGCSTTRANSPORTATIONCOST is considered to be incurred at the end of the transport. Therefore, the operator will use bot NAGCSTTRANSPORTATIONCOST and NAGTOTALRECEIPT from week 18 to calculate NAGCSTTRANSPORTATIONUNITCOST at week 18. However, if you have a lead time of 3, the operator will not calculate NAGCSTTRANSPORTATIONUNITCOST for the first 3 weeks. This is simply because, in a general case, it need to know NAGCSTTRANSPORTATIONUNITCOST associated with RW1 at the immediate upstream location to the plant in week 18-3 = 15 to calculate NAGCSTTRANSPORTATIONUNITCOST of RW1 at the plant in week 18. If week 18 falls within the first three weeks of the horizon then week 15 will be before the beginning of the horizon and hence not accessible to the operator. Hence the operator skips the first 3 weeks.

entry.title: Re: S4 HANA - Debugging Validation Rules (GGB0) in F110 - Automatic Payment Program
entry.content: Very useful document. Explained with clarity.

entry.title: SAC: Find drill level in hierarchy based on string
entry.content:
I would like the user to chose an organisational unit in a hierarchy and then the chart should depict the corresponding drill level with the node expanded.

getHierarchyLevel - just gives me the selected level 

Analytics Designer API Reference Guide Version 2024.2 (sap.com)

entry.title: Re: Optimizing Procurement Processes with Artificial Intelligence (AI) in SAP Central Invoice Manage
entry.content:
Thank you for the blog, very informative, anybody tried the CIM with the RISE Private edition? 

Any document on that?

entry.title: Assign manual batch/serial numbers for when the batch/serial automation setting is activated in CCO
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I hope this message finds you well.

I want to know if there is any possibility of assigning a manual batch/serial number for a sales item through a plugin when the automatic batch/serial number assign setting is activated in SAP Customer Checkout?

We have built a single screen for updating the batch/serial, quantity and price. Currently, our plugin is assigned custom batch/serial, quantity and price for a sales item. It's updated correctly in the customer checkout receipt but it's not updated in the SAP B1 after the payment. (without the automatic batch/serial number assign setting activated it works fine and updates the SAP B1 as well)

Thank You.!

Best Regards,

Ashen.

entry.title: Re: Customer master partner function field RF02D-KTONR Partner function number change
entry.content:
Hi,

If I have not misunderstood the problem, I recommend you to review USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCUMENT_PREPARE  by searching the google.

entry.title: Re: Can I add a column to the MAT0M search help?
entry.content:
Hello @luis_rod 

Yes, you can do that. You need to add LVORM to the MAT0M parameters:

However bear in mind that it is a change to SAP standard. Unlikely as it might seem, SAP might update the MAT0M search help and overwrite your modifications - see the answer from @tmt-cpro 

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: smarttable barcode
entry.content:
Hi

You can put your code inside onAfterRendering method of your view controller. This will ensure that your code is executed after rendering of view is finished.

Thanks

Sajid Khan

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Code Jam Error on Part 8
entry.content: I am checking with development. We got this issue several months ago and it had something to do with subscriptions and nothing about the specific destination. I will update when I know more.

entry.title: Re: How can I save Requirement in Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi, there is a dedicated channel to send requirements which can be voted by other customers.

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/3501

entry.title: Re: How can I save Requirement in Cloud ALM
entry.content: Hi, there is a dedicated channel to send requirements which can be voted by other customers.
